user.title: Connect to FreshTomato Router
user.description: Enter your FreshTomato router details. The HTTP ID can be found by viewing the page source of your router's admin interface and searching for 'http_id'.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to router. Check host, port and credentials.
error.invalid_http_id: Invalid HTTP ID. Please verify by checking the router's page source.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.
